C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\nse_engine_cpp.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\nse_engine_cpp.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\nse_engine_cpp.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -static -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc -shared -o C:\MAINDOMAIN\PRODUCTS\NSEAlphaFinder\engine\build_output\nse_engine_cpp.cp313-win_amd64.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\nse_engine_cpp.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\nse_engine_cpp.dir\linkLibs.rsp
